title: Past Events
content: Past Events SYNAPSE Club Signing Off Ceremony on 5th May, 2026 Cidering on 22nd Jan 2026 Bio Hackathon on 23rd January 2026 Agar Art Competition under BIOXCLERATE 2026 on 21st January 2026.
